mapper.select:
SELECT pa.id, pa.question_id, pa.user_id, pa.content, pa.created_at, ui.`name` AS userName, ui.images AS userImages, pq.title, pq.content AS questionContent, (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN cv.vote_type = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) FROM content_votes cv WHERE cv.answer_id = pa.id) AS up_count, (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN cv.vote_type = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) FROM content_votes cv WHERE cv.answer_id = pa.id) AS down_count FROM party_answers pa LEFT JOIN party_questions pq ON (pq.id = pa.question_id) LEFT JOIN user_info ui ON (ui.id = pa.user_id) WHERE 1 = 1
AND ui.`name` LIKE CONCAT('%',#{queryFrom.userName},'%')
AND pq.title LIKE CONCAT('%',#{queryFrom.title},'%')
AND ui.user_id = #{queryFrom.userId}
ORDER BY pa.created_at DESC

SELECT pa.id, pa.question_id, pa.user_id, pa.content, pa.created_at, ui.`name` AS userName, ui.images AS userImages, pq.title, pq.content AS questionContent, (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN cv.vote_type = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) FROM content_votes cv WHERE cv.answer_id = pa.id) AS up_count, (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN cv.vote_type = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) FROM content_votes cv WHERE cv.answer_id = pa.id) AS down_count FROM party_answers pa LEFT JOIN party_questions pq ON (pq.id = pa.question_id) LEFT JOIN user_info ui ON (ui.id = pa.user_id) WHERE 1 = 1 AND pa.question_id = #{questionId} ORDER BY pa.created_at DESC
